entity.summary: Advanced and institutional cryptocurrency trading platform established in 2019 within the broader Crypto.com ecosystem, with later staged expansion of Exchange access in the United States.
entity.notes: The record covers the Crypto.com Exchange product rather than the broader Crypto.com App and company. The exact original global launch day remains unresolved, so the existing year-level 2019 marker is retained.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2019 and still operating under the Crypto.com Exchange brand.

changes.summary: Advanced and institutional cryptocurrency trading platform established in 2019 within the broader Crypto.com ecosystem, with later staged expansion of Exchange access in the United States.
changes.notes: The record covers the Crypto.com Exchange product rather than the broader Crypto.com App and company. The exact original global launch day remains unresolved, so the existing year-level 2019 marker is retained.

events.title: Crypto.com began U.S. Exchange rollout
events.description: Crypto.com began a staged U.S. rollout of the Exchange for selected institutional investors on March 15, 2022.
events.notes: Regional product expansion; not the original global Exchange launch.

events.title: Crypto.com announced broader U.S. Exchange launch
events.description: Crypto.com announced a broader U.S. Exchange launch for institutional and advanced traders in January 2025.
events.notes: Later U.S. expansion milestone following the limited 2022 rollout.

evidence.title: Crypto.com Exchange
evidence.notes: Current official Exchange page confirming active operation.

evidence.title: Crypto.com Begins Exchange Rollout in the U.S.
evidence.notes: Official announcement of the initial U.S. Exchange rollout.

evidence.title: Crypto.com Exchange Set for U.S. Launch
evidence.notes: Official announcement of the later U.S. launch milestone.

evidence.title: Crypto.com Exchange joins Lynq as a launch partner
evidence.notes: The official company article describes the Crypto.com Exchange as established in 2019.
